Headline: #53 Pulaski Temporary Southbound Reroute near 47th/Pulaski
ShortDescription: Southbound #53 Pulaski buses are rerouted via Pulaski, 47th, Lawndale, Archer. then resume their normal route on Pulaski due to police activity nr 47th/Pulaski.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

Southbound #53 Pulaski buses are temporarily rerouted via Pulaski, 47th, Lawndale, Archer. then resume their normal route on Pulaski.

Northbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to police activity near 47th/Pulaski.
